2. travel_dates: July 15–19, 2024 — present and specific.

4. accommodation: Boutique Stay, 4-star, central Lisbon — €540 total — fully specified.
5. activities: three activities listed with names, dates, and costs — fully specified.
6. additional_services: Priority Airport Assistance and Lounge Access included — present, but no cost specified. Since the format requires 'with costs', this is incomplete.
7. total_budget: €1,600 (within €1,700 budget) — present and complete.
Thus, 6 out of 7 items are fully specified according to the format requirements.
